dialogues.text: I've been up since four. I kept thinking about you. Here — take this. Please.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. You've always been too proud to ask for help. Don't start now.
dialogues.no_response: I'll leave it on the table. It'll be there when you're ready.

dialogues.text: I sold your grandfather's watch. The money should go to you. He'd have wanted that.
dialogues.yes_response: He would have been proud of you. He never said it enough. Neither did I.
dialogues.no_response: I'll put it in an envelope. You come back for it whenever you can.

dialogues.text: I made too much soup again. And I have this set aside. Take it.
dialogues.yes_response: You look pale. You've looked pale for weeks. Come inside soon. Please.
dialogues.no_response: The soup will keep. So will I. Come back when you can.

dialogues.text: I lit a candle for you at church every morning this week. And I brought you this.
dialogues.yes_response: I say a prayer for you every day. I'm not going to stop.
dialogues.no_response: That's alright. I'll keep praying anyway. You don't have to take anything.

dialogues.text: Your aunt asked about you. I didn't know what to say to her. Here — just take this.
dialogues.yes_response: I told her you were doing fine. I hope that was the right thing to say.
dialogues.no_response: I'll tell her you said hello. That's enough for now.

dialogues.text: I don't need much. I never have. You take this. I mean it.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. That's all I wanted to do. Just do something.
dialogues.no_response: Stubborn. You get that from your father. Come back soon.

dialogues.text: I keep wanting to give you things. I don't know why. I just do. Here.
dialogues.yes_response: I just — I need to feel useful. You understand. You've always understood.
dialogues.no_response: Come back soon. That's the only thing I really want from you.

dialogues.text: I found some money I'd forgotten about. It was in an old coat. It should be yours.
dialogues.yes_response: Sometimes things show up when you need them. I like to think that.
dialogues.no_response: It's not going anywhere. Neither am I.

dialogues.text: I baked this morning. First time in months. I don't know why today. Take this too.
dialogues.yes_response: You're too thin. I notice. Mothers always notice.
dialogues.no_response: The door is always open. You know that. It's always open.

dialogues.text: Before you go. Take this. I love you. You know that, don't you.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. Just — come back. That's all I need. Just come back.
dialogues.no_response: I know. I know you do. Just come back tomorrow.
